
---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug affecting ReadyCheck functionality or operational workflows
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the issue.

---

## Environment

- App/Service: (e.g., admin, mobile, web, api-gateway, ai-orchestrator)
- Environment: (e.g., local, staging, production)
- Device/Platform: (e.g., iOS, Android, Web, Desktop)
- OS Version:
- App Version/Commit SHA:
- Network Conditions (if relevant):

---

## Affected Workflow

Describe the operational workflow impacted (e.g., assessment submission, deployment planning, readiness verification, team assignment, route validation).

---

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

---

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened?

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to:
2. Perform:
3. Submit/Trigger:
4. Observe:

Be as specific as possible to allow reproduction.

---

## Logs / Screenshots

- Attach logs, console output, or API responses if available
- Include screenshots or screen recordings if relevant

---

## Severity

Select one:

- [ ] Critical (Blocks deployment or causes unsafe decisions)
- [ ] High (Major feature broken, impacts readiness or coordination)
- [ ] Medium (Partial degradation of workflow)
- [ ] Low (Minor issue or cosmetic problem)

---

## Deployment Impact

Does this issue affect deployment readiness or decision-making?

- [ ] Blocks deployment entirely
- [ ] Causes incorrect readiness status
- [ ] Causes incorrect role/task assignment
- [ ] No direct deployment impact

Provide details if applicable:

---

## Readiness / Safety Implications

Does this issue introduce risk to real-world operations?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, describe potential risks:
- Incorrect instructions
- Misunderstood roles
- Unsafe route or logistics decisions
- Missing critical checks
- Other:

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, edge cases, or observations that may help diagnose the issue.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues
- [ ] I have included clear reproduction steps
- [ ] I have provided logs/screenshots where possible
- [ ] I have assessed deployment/readiness impact
